explanation: The user wants to clean the mug. Currently, the mug is dirty and being held. To clean it, I first need to place it in the sink basin where it can be washed. Then, I turn on the faucet to ensure water is flowing. After cleaning, I pick up the mug again to prepare it for use or further actions. The plan follows standard cleaning procedures and respects the robot's constraints (e.g., holding one object at a time, placing only when holding).
